addGroupEventStartOffset.signature: void addGroupEventStartOffset(int layerIndex, int groupIndex, double startOffsetSamples)
addGroupEventStartOffset.description: Adds a start offset to the event that matches the given layer and group.

createNoteMap.description: Creates a note map for the given layer.

delayGroupEvent.signature: void delayGroupEvent(int layerIndex, int groupIndex, double delayInSamples)
delayGroupEvent.description: Delays the event that matches the given layer and group.

fadeInGroupEvent.signature: void fadeInGroupEvent(int layerIndex, int groupIndex, double fadeInTimeMs, double targetGainDb)
fadeInGroupEvent.description: Adds a fade in to the event that matches the given layer and group.

fadeOutGroupEvent.signature: void fadeOutGroupEvent(int layerIndex, int groupIndex, double fadeOutTimeMs)
fadeOutGroupEvent.description: Fades out all voices that are playing the given layer / group.

getCurrentPeak.signature: float getCurrentPeak(int layerIndex, int groupIndex, int eventId)
getCurrentPeak.description: Returns the peak volume of the first sound that was started with the given event ID.

getLayerIndex.description: Returns the index of the given layer.

getLayerProperty.description: Returns the value of a given layer property.

getNumGroupsInLayer.description: Returns the number of groups in this layer.

isNoteNumberMapped.description: Checks if the given note number has any samples mapped in this layer.

registerGroupStartCallback.description: Registers a callback that will be executed with each group index that was started.

setEnableGainTracking.signature: void setEnableGainTracking(var layerIdOrIndex, int groupIndex, bool shouldBeActive)
setEnableGainTracking.description: Enables gain tracking of all samples that match the given layer and group.

setFixedGroupEventLength.signature: void setFixedGroupEventLength(int layerIndex, int groupIndex, double numSamplesToPlayBeforeFadeout)
setFixedGroupEventLength.description: Sets the sample to fade out with the given fade-in time after a fixed length.

setGroupVolume.signature: void setGroupVolume(int layerIndex, int groupIndex, double gainFactor)
setGroupVolume.description: Sets the smoothed volume for the given layer / group.

setLayerProperty.signature: void setLayerProperty(var layerIdOrIndex, String propertyId, var value)
